meta.notes: Fresh rerun of the latest Codex benchmark prompt with each timed step executed separately. No install step and no upload step. The current skill path performs proxy API transcription inside the full caption script. Token totals were isolated to this benchmark window with extract-codex-tokens.py --latest --after ... --before ... --json.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: Portrait vlog benchmark asset with spoken English audio for TikTok-style caption burn-in.

task.name: video-captions
task.purpose: Benchmark the current video-captions skill on the standard 67.8s daily vlog asset using TikTok-style burned-in captions with the script's proxy API transcription waterfall.
task.expected_output: A captioned mp4 with TikTok-style word-highlight subtitles burned into the video.

install.notes: Not applicable. The skill was already present locally at ~/code/nova3-agent-skills/video-captions/.

steps.name: caption_script_full
steps.notes: Full caption_video.py run with --style tiktok. The script used proxy API transcription (Whisper -> Deepgram -> Gemini), reported 132 words, generated /tmp/bench_vc_captioned.ass, and burned captions into the output video.

execution.notes: Execution total is probe plus the full caption script. The updated prompt no longer benchmarks standalone extract/transcribe steps.

delivery.notes: Local delivery only; output remained on disk at /tmp/bench_vc_captioned.mp4.

tokens._note: Extractor-authoritative total token delta from extract-codex-tokens.py for this benchmark window. cache_read_tokens and cache_write_tokens are reported separately and are not added again into total_tokens here.

cost._note: Codex cost in this artifact follows extract-codex-tokens.py methodology: price input_tokens and output_tokens only. cache_read_tokens and cache_write_tokens are retained as informational fields and are not separately charged here.
